$comment: SAI repo Claude Code settings — Mimi dispatcher discipline. Documented copy: .ai/agents/mimi/runtimes/claude/claude-desktop-bootstrap.json

hooks.command: echo 'SAI ICM workspace: read CLAUDE.md + .ai/CONTEXT.md first. Dispatch via mimi-dispatcher subagent; report events with scripts/agent-report; contracts live in .ai/contracts/; no force-push, no self-activation in registry.'

python3 -c "import json,sys,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); bad=re.search(r'push[^|;&]*(--force|\\s-f\\b)', c); sys.exit(2 if bad else 0)" || { echo 'SAI dispatch discipline: force-push is prohibited (CHARTER + contract hard limit).' >&2; exit 2; }

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print('SAI reminder: verify remote SHA and emit PUSH via scripts/agent-report push-confirm.') if 'git push' in c else None"
